summary: Second review keeps one issue and adds a new one.

findings.title: Context packet misses stale-memory invalidation note
findings.evidence: Packet summary omits any stale-memory classification.
findings.explanation: A later run could reuse obsolete findings without an explicit invalidation signal.

findings.title: README should mention WORKMEM_HOME override
findings.evidence: Storage section only describes the default path.
findings.explanation: Users may need an override when sandboxed or on restricted systems.
